name: AIVON Plug-in for KiCad
description: Start prototype and assembly by sending files to AIVON with just one click.
description_full:
Click this plugin for high quality prototyping and assembly services, AIVON will commit to meeting your needs to the greatest extent.

When you click AIVON Plug-in button, we will export these files in your project:

1. Gerber files in correct format for production
2. IPC-Netlist file
3. Bom-file that includes all information of components (please note designator, quantity, MPN/part number, package/footprint are necessary)
4. Pick and Place-file used in assembly

You can click "Save to Cart" to place an order immediately after uploading the files ( usually only takes a few seconds), our engineers will double check the files before the production.

About AIVON:

AIVON is a one-stop PCB prototyping and assembly platform. Standard PCB build time is 24 hours. We provide high quality PCBs and professional engineering review for every order.
